svg.aria-label: GHCP-MEM marketing reel: pain (Copilot has no memory) → solution (local-first persistent memory pipeline) → 4 differentiators → install CTA.

g.text: Re-explaining context to Copilot every session
And the secrets you pasted in just to explain something?
They sit in chat history forever.
Yesterday's decisions, problems solved, files touched — back in ~1 second.
WHY NOT JUST WAIT FOR COPILOT MEMORY?
Four things only GHCP-MEM gives you today.
Cloud memory keeps it on a server.
